ibuprofen.safetyNote: Take with food/water if possible. Avoid combining with other NSAIDs. Verify with prescription, leaflet, doctor, or pharmacist.

dafalgan.maxDailyDoseLabel: Max 3-4 g/day depending on situation; verify leaflet/doctor
dafalgan.safetyNote: Do not combine with other medicines containing paracetamol. Verify with prescription, leaflet, doctor, or pharmacist.
